{{Quote|Dr. Lucien guarantees me that only minor modifications are necessary to a 3PO's already impressive array of sensors in order to make it a first-class intelligence-gathering Droid, costing thousands less than the Arakyd Viper Probe Droid.|Doctor Tobias|<ref name="ISB" />}}
[[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] '''Lucien''' was a<ref name="ISB" /> [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Technician/Legends|technician]]<ref name="Dead" /> working for [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] in the [[Analysis Bureau (Imperial Intelligence)|Analysis Bureau's]] [[Tech (Imperial Intelligence)|Tech]] branch. Along with Dr. [[Tobias]], Lucien believed that [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|3PO-series protocol droids]] could, with slight modification, be used as excellent infiltration droids.<ref name="ISB" /> Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the pair were able to realize their idea by planting sabotaged [[Droid/Legends|droids]] with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The droids ended up on the [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] ''[[Shadow Raptor]]'', where they led a [[Shadow Raptor revolt|revolt]]. A team of Alliance operatives tracked the droids' origin to [[Teagan]], where [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] was operating in a [[Kwymar Automation Ltd.]] warehouse. The engineers retreated when the team arrived.<ref name="Dead" />
